title: The Star
content:
Last night
    I watched a star fall like a great pearl into the sea,
    Till my ego expanding encompassed sea and star,
    Containing both as in a trembling cup.
meaning:
"The Star" is a quintessential example of Lola Ridge's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
